bead.title: Document and gate the heimq release process
bead.description: Add the release runbook and final release-check surface from docs/release/release-infrastructure-plan.md. Current state: no docs release runbook exists except the plan. In-scope files: docs/release/**, justfile or Makefile if a release-check target is needed, README.md links if needed. Required content: tag naming, pre-release verification, workflow behavior, artifact verification, Docker/Helm publish locations, rollback/recovery. Out of scope: implementing missing release workflows already covered by other beads.
bead.acceptance:
1. `test -f docs/release/runbook.md` passes.
2. `grep -q "vX.Y.Z" docs/release/runbook.md` passes.
3. The runbook documents pre-release verification, artifact verification, Docker and Helm publish locations, and rollback/recovery.
4. `just release-check` or `make release-check` exists and runs the available local release validation commands.
5. `grep -q "docs/release/runbook.md" README.md` passes.
6. `cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes.
7. `cargo test --workspace --all-targets` passes.
8. `helm lint charts/heimq` and `helm template heimq charts/heimq` pass.
